ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description or bio of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "joined_channel" TEXT /* Channel (web, mobile, desktop) through which the user joined */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last active */,
  "private_account" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is private */,
  "blocked_users" TEXT /* List of user IDs that the user has blocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "post_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post type (text, image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media (image or video) if applicable */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the post (public, private, friends only) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the post was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (web, mobile, desktop) used to create the post */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated score based on likes, comments, and shares */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the post */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (like, comment, share) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (web, mobile, desktop) used for the engagement */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel (web, mobile, desktop) through which the engagement occurred */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated score for the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (web, mobile, desktop) used to make the comment */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel (web, mobile, desktop) through which the comment was made */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated score based on likes and replies to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (web, mobile, desktop) used to share the post */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel (web, mobile, desktop) through which the share occurred */,
  "share_message" TEXT /* Additional message or comment added when sharing the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (web, mobile, desktop) used to like the post */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel (web, mobile, desktop) through which the like occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tag_relationships" (
  "post_tag_relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag relationship */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tag_relationships_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tag_relationships_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., hashtag, location, person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)
